src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/AddSe.general_idea: Rename the Catalogue dependency to CatalogueSensors to reflect its specific domain responsibility.
Replace the old RoomMapper utility with a new RoomAssembler class for domain-to-DTO conversion.
Change getDevicesFromRoom to return a list of DeviceDTOs instead of raw Device objects.
Implement DeviceDTO mapping using a new DeviceAssembler class within getDevicesFromRoom.
Update addSensorToDevice to accept DeviceDTO and return SensorDTO instead of raw domain objects.
src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/AddSe.human_impl: public SensorDTO addSensorToDevice(DeviceDTO deviceDTO, String strSensorModel)

src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/AddSe.general_idea: Inject a SensorFactory into the addSensorToDevice method to handle sensor creation.
Convert the created Sensor domain object to SensorDTO using SensorAssembler before returning.

src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/Defin.general_idea: Expanded the defineHouseLocation method signature to accept more specific location details.
src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/Defin.human_impl: public LocationDTO defineHouseLocation(String street, String zipCode, int doorNumber, double latitude, double longitude)

src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/Defin.general_idea: Changed the thrown exception from InstantiationException to IllegalArgumentException.
Updated the call to _house.defineLocation to pass the new expanded arguments.
src/main/java/SmartHome/controller/Defin.human_impl: Location location = _house.defineLocation(street, zipCode, doorNumber, latitude, longitude);

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Device.ja.general_idea: Updated addSensor method signature to accept CatalogueSensors and SensorFactory instead of Catalogue.
src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Device.ja.human_impl: public Sensor addSensor(String strModel, CatalogueSensors catalogue, SensorFactory sensorFactory) ...

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Replace primitive string fields with composite Address and Gps objects to improve domain modeling.
Introduce factory dependencies to decouple object creation from the Location class.
src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..human_impl: Added `AddressFactory _addressFactory` and `GpsFactory _gpsFactory` fields and constructor parameters.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Expand constructor to accept all necessary data for creating composite objects via factories.
src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..human_impl: Changed constructor to accept `street`, `zipCode`, `doorNumber`, `latitude`, `longitude`, and factory instances.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Switch from checked InstantiationException to unchecked IllegalArgumentException for validation errors.
src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..human_impl: Changed `throws InstantiationException` to `throws IllegalArgumentException` in constructor signature.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Delegate validation responsibility to the factory classes instead of handling it in the domain object.
src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..human_impl: Removed `isValidConstructorArguments` method and manual null/empty checks.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Update getter methods to return the new composite types instead of primitive strings.

src/main/java/SmartHome/dto/LocationDTO..general_idea: Renamed the street field to _address to reflect a broader address concept.
Removed the postalCode field as it is no longer part of the DTO structure.
Added a new _gps field to store GPS location data.
Updated constructor to map the new _address field from location.getAddress().toString().
Updated constructor to map the new _gps field from location.getGpsLocation().toString().
Removed constructor assignment for the deleted street field.
Removed constructor assignment for the deleted postalCode field.

src/main/java/SmartHome/sensors/GA100K.j.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the renaming of the Catalogue class to CatalogueSensors.
Change the constructor parameter type from Catalogue to CatalogueSensors to match the renamed class.
